# ArrowUpDown

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ArrowUpDown;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ArrowUpDown { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
bidirectional, two-way, 2-way, swap, switch, network, mobile data, internet, sort, reorder, move

## Categories
arrows
